## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and align on marketing strategy and initiatives for Surge AI](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Comprehensive list of potential marketing initiatives created; focus on prioritization and execution](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Brand identity (visual style, tone of voice) needs refinement for consistent execution](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Technical workshops and on-site presence identified as high-impact opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Benchmarks prioritized over open datasets; video podcast series deprioritized](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

## Topics

### Brand Identity and Execution

  - [Current bottleneck: Unclear brand guidelines slowing execution](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Need to define essence of Surge AI and how it translates to visual language, style, tone, and voice](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Potential direction: Anti-hype, minimalist aesthetic focusing on typography and white space](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Aim: Create consistent language for faster, more predictable execution](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1897.0)

### Technical Workshops and On-site Presence

  - [High priority: Organize technical workshops, potentially on-site at customer locations](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Benefits: Build distribution, create repurposable content, enhance trust](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Example: Recent workshop post generated 600 comments, 250 registrants](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Goal: Increase on-site presence to facilitate valuable hallway conversations and relationship-building](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)

### Content Creation and Distribution

  - [Blog posts in progress; need to address platform constraints (e.g., Webflow vs. custom solution)](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Distribution strategy: Leverage existing networks, use tools like Megaphone for amplification](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Expectation setting: Building reach takes time; consistent quality posting yields compounding results](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)

### Prioritization of Initiatives

  - [Benchmarks moved up in priority; open datasets deprioritized](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Video podcast series lowered in priority due to resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Meetups identified as lower effort, ecosystem-building opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)

### Collaboration with Meta

  - [Upcoming release of reinforcement learning environment](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Opportunity for Surge AI to write a blog post highlighting early involvement](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Potential for tech talk or workshop featuring Meta researcher](https://fathom.video/share/ggD6xvuux1ayev5BgmimD8q_E--Rk_pB?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
